subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! Your letter was perused and its purport understood, but 'Abdu'l-Bahá must ensure your well-being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نامه شما ملاحظه گردید و مطلب معلوم شد ولی عبدالبهاء باید خیر شما
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
